description_long: This is a mid-century modern style sofa featuring a solid wooden frame with a rich brown finish and clean, straight lines. The seat and backrest are upholstered in a muted green fabric, both appearing as single, continuous cushions that are slightly contoured for comfort. The armrests are constructed from the same wood as the frame, extending vertically from the seat and matching the height of the backrest, giving the sofa a boxy, enclosed appearance. The legs are short, square, and positioned at the corners, providing stable support while maintaining a low profile. The upholstery is smooth and unadorned, with no visible tufting, stitching, or decorative patterns. This sofa would be well-suited for urban parks, public waiting areas, or modern outdoor lounges.
description: A modern wooden-framed sofa with muted green, smooth, continuous seat and back cushions, and straight, boxy armrests. The design is minimalist, with a solid wood base and short, square legs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the solid wooden armrest and the thickness of the green seat and back cushions.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide, continuous green cushions and the straight, boxy wooden armrests.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first, with the same solid wooden armrest and cushion profile.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the full wooden back panel and the top edge of the green back cushion.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single, continuous seat and back cushions, both attached and uniform in size, with no visible segmentation or tufting.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy wooden armrests at each end, matching the height of the backrest, with no padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, square wooden legs positioned at the corners, exposed and matching the frame's wood finish.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight, continuous backrest with a single attached cushion, no segmentation or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid green fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
